MODULE: cosmos.plugins.base
FILE: cosmos/plugins/base.py (469 lines)
CATEGORY: plugins

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Plugin Base Classes

"With my new invention, the plugin system, anyone can add to my genius!"

Base classes and interfaces for the cosmos plugin system.

CLASSES:
- PluginStatus(Enum): Plugin lifecycle status.
- PluginCapability(Enum): Plugin capability types.
- PluginMetadata: Plugin metadata.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- Plugin(ABC): Base class for cosmos plugins.

Plugins extend cosmos's functionality by providi
  Methods: def id(self) -> str
  Methods: def name(self) -> str
  Methods: def version(self) -> str
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def activate(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def deactivate(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def shutdown(self) -> bool
  Methods: def get_tools(self) -> Dict[str, Callable]
- PluginManager: Manages cosmos plugins.

Handles:
- Plugin discovery and loading
- Lifecycle man
  Methods: def register(self, plugin: Plugin) -> bool
  Methods: def unregister(self, plugin_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_plugin(self, plugin_id: str) -> Optional[Plugin]
  Methods: def list_plugins(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def initialize_plugin(self, plugin_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def activate_plugin(self, plugin_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def deactivate_plugin(self, plugin_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def shutdown_plugin(self, plugin_id: str) -> bool
